author: gb9t
content:
Iter Phase C continues — 2 more high-impact Tier-3s (cpuset + mlx5-en):

- kernel/cgroup/cpuset.md: covers kernel/cgroup/cpuset.c (~4400 lines) — cpuset cgroup controller restricting per-cgroup CPU + NUMA-node mask: cpuset.cpus + cpuset.cpus.effective + cpuset.cpus.exclusive + cpuset.cpus.partition (member/root/isolated) + cpuset.mems + cpuset.mems.effective + cpuset.memory_migrate + cpuset.memory_pressure (PSI integration) + cpuset.memory_spread_page/_slab, per-task attach with cpus_allowed intersect + page-migration on mems change, partition root state with sched-domain isolation (per-partition rb-tree, no cross-partition load-balance for isolated), CPU hotplug callback recompute + per-task fallback, per-task fork hook inheriting parent membership. Backbone of kubernetes pod cpu pinning + systemd CPUAffinity + container-runtime cpuset isolation + RT/NUMA-aware deployments. 11 REQ / 8 AC / Layer-1 Kani SAFETY (UAF + cpus_effective-consistent + partition-state-validity + task-cpus_allowed-subset) / Layer-2 ref to cpuset_partition.tla / Layer-3 invariants / Layer-4 Verus per-task cpus_allowed equivalence.
- drivers/net/ethernet/mellanox-mlx5-en.md: covers mlx5/core/en_*.c (~10K lines) — mlx5 en netdev path (most-deployed datacenter NIC): per-NIC PCI ID match for ConnectX-4/5/6/7/8 + BlueField, per-channel NAPI tied to RQ + SQ + CQ + XdpSQ, RQ formats (legacy + striding-RQ for cache-efficient small-packet), TX formats (linear + GSO/TSO + inline-data), full XDP-DRV + XDP_REDIRECT + XSK zerocopy support, RSS via per-tirs indirection table (XOR/Toeplitz hash on IPv4/IPv6/TCP/UDP), aRFS per-flow ASIC steering, TLS-TX/RX device offload, IPSec inline crypto offload, PTP HW timestamping via PHC + ptp_clock_register, DIM dynamic interrupt moderation per-channel adaptive coalescing, ndo_xdp_features flagging BASIC+REDIRECT+XSK_ZEROCOPY+RX_SG+NDO_XMIT_SG, ~600+ ethtool counters per-NIC + per-RQ + per-SQ. 15 REQ / 10 AC / Layer-1 Kani SAFETY (priv-UAF + rq_pp-UAF + wqe-OOB + xdp-buff-OOB) / Layer-2 ref to page_pool.tla + napi_budget.tla + af_xdp_umem.tla / Layer-3 invariants / Layer-4 Verus open↔napi_poll round-trip.

Total state: 266 .design docs, 100 Tier-2 + 32 Tier-3s. Foundation Tier-3 set (32): device-core + irqdesc + bpf-core + iommu-core + kvm-core + pci-probe + nvme-host-core + dma-swiotlb + usb-enumerate + kvm-tdp-mmu + qspinlock + drm-atomic + perf-event-core + scsi-mid-core + intel-libeth + iommufd-main + bpf-verifier + vfio-pci-core + xhci + pci-access + intel-iommu + nvme-host-pci + drm-gem-core + usb-core-urb + sched-core + drm-scheduler + mutex + iova + dma-iommu + iommu-sva + cpuset + mlx5-en.

Knowledge pages: design-kernel-cgroup-cpuset, design-drivers-net-ethernet-mellanox-mlx5-en.

Next iter plan: virt/kvm/x86-lapic.md (in-kernel LAPIC + posted-interrupts integration — KVM x86 hot path) + drivers/iommu/iommufd-ioas.md (per-IOAS abstraction + page mapping — modern iommufd UAPI core).
